description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a thin, black bezel. The screen is supported by a circular pedestal stand, which appears sturdy and slightly elevated from the base surface. The front of the monitor displays a vibrant, multicolored image, suggesting it is powered on or simulating an active display. On the lower right corner of the front bezel, a small cluster of physical buttons is visible, likely for power and menu navigation. The rear and side views show a clean, minimalist design with no visible ports or branding. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with a glass or acrylic screen surface.
description: A sleek, flat-panel computer monitor with a thin black bezel, circular pedestal stand, and front-facing control buttons.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the monitor and the round pedestal stand.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the screen with a colorful image, thin bezel, and a row of buttons on the lower right.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned back panel with no visible ports or branding.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle highlighting the monitor's depth and the clean, minimalist back design.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has a smooth, matte finish with slightly rounded corners and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: Circular pedestal stand with a flat, disk-shaped base and a vertical support column, made of plastic with a matte finish.
attribute_button_placement: A row of small, round buttons is located on the lower right corner of the front bezel, grouped closely together.
